name: MJ Hegar
subject: What a night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I'm fired up and ready to take on Sen. Cornyn!

| | Hey Peter --

I just got off the debate stage, and wow am I fired up and ready to face Senator Cornyn this November! It's clear Texans need a fighter right now, and I know I can take the fight to Senator Cornyn and win.

Tonight, we reached voters all across the state and shared with them what this campaign is all about -- putting hardworking Texas families first. **I 'm meeting voters where they're at, because I know that's the only way we're going to build the Texas-sized grassroots team we need to beat Sen. Cornyn.**

Speaking of our grassroots team, my campaign manager let me know that we reached our pre-debate goal -- thanks so much, y'all! I'm so proud of what this team has come together to build, but we've got a lot of work to do from now until November. **Will you pitch in to help me win the runoff and kick Mitch McConnell 's right hand man out of the Senate? ** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Michael Biundo
subject: STAND WITH RAND in the Granite State
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Corky Messner just got a huge endorsement to defeat Jeanne Shaheen! Read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1e867c68ccb8c44d/8af1093a37f622f1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Have you heard the news yet? My friend Corky Messner just got a major endorsement from another friend of mine — Rand Paul. As a former strategist for Rand Paul for President, I know that he puts a lot of thought into which candidates he will endorse. **Corky is running for Senate in New Hampshire to defeat leftist career politician Jeanne Shaheen in November, and keep the Senate RED**. The Democrats have targeted this race in an effort to gain the majority. They know that if they lose this seat to Corky, there’s almost no chance they’ll flip the Senate, so they’re doing everything they can to win. We can’t let that happen. Corky is exactly the kind of Constitutional Conservative that we need right now. **[Will you STAND WITH RAND today by supporting Corky’s campaign with a donation of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, or what you can?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1e867c68ccb8c44d/a4a00e6fe432893bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** I won’t lie. This is going to be a tough race. That’s why Senator Paul is throwing his weight behind Corky. He knows that Corky embodies New Hampshire’s “Live Free or Die” spirit of independence and liberty, and is looking forward to serving with him and defending President Trump in the Senate. Here’s what the Senator had to say about Corky: _Corky Messner is an outsider who understands the need for more leaders who will buck the status quo and defend the Constitution. He’s a businessman who knows how important it is to get our debt and deficit under control and our spending in check. He’s a veteran who has served our country honorably and believes, like President Trump and I do, that we must end the endless wars and take care of our veterans, who have sacrificed so much._ I’ve known Rand a long time, and he’s a proven warrior for personal liberty and individual freedoms. He knows that if we want to Keep America Great, we have to help Corky win this seat in the Granite State. **[Will you help us take back this seat for the GOP and keep our majority in the Senate?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/1e867c68ccb8c44d/d5099db7a61e5936c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** We have some great momentum already, but we need to keep it going if we want a shot at winning this for the GOP. We can’t afford to lose in November. Can I count on you? Thanks for your support,
Michael Biundo

clean_body: Corky Messner just got a huge endorsement to defeat Jeanne Shaheen! Read more >> Peter, Have you heard the news yet? My friend Corky Messner just got a major endorsement from another friend of mine — Rand Paul. As a former strategist for Rand Paul for President, I know that he puts a lot of thought into which candidates he will endorse. Corky is running for Senate in New Hampshire to defeat leftist career politician Jeanne Shaheen in November, and keep the Senate RED. The Democrats have targeted this race in an effort to gain the majority. They know that if they lose this seat to Corky, there’s almost no chance they’ll flip the Senate, so they’re doing everything they can to win. We can’t let that happen. Corky is exactly the kind of Constitutional Conservative that we need right now. I won’t lie. This is going to be a tough race. That’s why Senator Paul is throwing his weight behind Corky. He knows that Corky embodies New Hampshire’s “Live Free or Die” spirit of independence and liberty, and is looking forward to serving with him and defending President Trump in the Senate. Here’s what the Senator had to say about Corky: Corky Messner is an outsider who understands the need for more leaders who will buck the status quo and defend the Constitution. He’s a businessman who knows how important it is to get our debt and deficit under control and our spending in check. He’s a veteran who has served our country honorably and believes, like President Trump and I do, that we must end the endless wars and take care of our veterans, who have sacrificed so much. I’ve known Rand a long time, and he’s a proven warrior for personal liberty and individual freedoms. He knows that if we want to Keep America Great, we have to help Corky win this seat in the Granite State. We have some great momentum already, but we need to keep it going if we want a shot at winning this for the GOP. We can’t afford to lose in November. Can I count on you? Thanks for your support, Michael Biundo | | | ---|--- id:2020-06-03-15:38:35:383t PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

name: MJ Hegar Policy Team
subject: How do we fix this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
The criminal justice system needs fixing -- and it needs it now.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489001a/7f51f7bc/4ed101dd/4ef68c90/119752896/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Centuries of pain have manifested into protests across the nation. People are demanding justice for Black Americans who have been impacted by generations of oppression -- from slavery, to Jim Crow and segregation, to a criminal justice system that disproportionately harms and kills them.

**We need real policing and criminal justice reform -- and leaders who will fight like hell to achieve it.** MJ has a robust policing and criminal justice reform platform, but she understands her perspective is limited and wants to hear from you: Will you take two minutes to complete MJ's survey? | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489001a/7f51f7bc/4ed101dd/4ef68c97/119752896/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-cjrsurvey")
---
We have a lot of work to do, and we can't let the work fall solely on Black Americans. MJ knows that as she runs for Senate, it's also her responsibility to step up and work to put an end to these injustices. [**Fill out her survey to let her know what you think we can do.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489001a/7f51f7bc/4ed101dd/4ef68c97/119752896/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-cjrsurvey")

\-- Team MJ

Team,
Black and brown Americans are killed and brutalized by police at a frightening rate.
Nearly **one thousand** people are shot and killed by the police each year, and Black and brown men and women make up a disproportionate number of those murdered.

# Republican congressional candidate Matt Mayberry says he knows who to call to get things done
**DOVER, N.H. —** Matt Mayberry of Dover says he’s been involved in politics since he was a teenager – for about four decades now. Yet, in his 1st District U.S. House Republican primary race against race against 30-year-old Matt Mowers, Mayberry says that ironically, he’s the outsider. Mayberry, 55, will head to the State House on Friday afternoon to officially file for the seat currently held by Democratic first-term U.S. Rep. Chris Pappas. Mowers, a 30-year-old former aide to former New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie and former Trump administration appointee to the State Department, filed his paperwork Wednesday. While Mowers is making his first run at elective politics, Mayberry has run and won in local races in his home city – first as a member of the city council and later as a school board member. He has been a vice chair of the New Hampshire Republican Party, active in the Strafford County GOP and has been an alternate delegate to two Republican national conventions. He has worked on many New Hampshire campaigns on all levels. “It’s kind of funny,” Mayberry said Thursday. “The guy who’s been involved in hundreds of New Hampshire campaigns is the outsider.” He has also been a community volunteer for a wide range of groups and causes. It all stems, he said, from his upbringing in a low-income household in Gorham, Maine. “When I saw my mom sell her wedding ring to buy us food, and the Rotary Club provided Christmas and the Kiwanis Club did Thanksgiving, I saw other people helping my family and I’ve always wanted to pay it back,” he said. In the 1980s, Mayberry served three years in the U.S. Air Force and pointed out that he’s the only veteran in the 1st District race. He recalls a trying to save the life of a 9-month-old boy, the son of a fellow service member, on a cargo plane flying over the North Atlantic. The boy died from angina, Mayberry remembered. The lesson: “We ask a lot of our 19- and 20-year-olds who serve in the military,” he said. In 2018, Mayberry was appointed to chair the board of the New Hampshire Commission on Human Rights. And over the years, he has volunteered for several veterans’ initiatives, including Liberty House, the Community Toolbox and Habitat for Humanity. Now, Mayberry views himself as the proven conservative in the race. While pro-choice, “with restrictions,” he is staunchly pro-Second Amendment, having organized numerous gun shows, and he supports President Donald Trump’s appointments to the U.S. Supreme Court and approach to trade. “He has kept his promises and has done exactly what he said he would do,” Mayberry said. He said that while he supports Gov. Chris Sununu’s careful handling of the COVID-19 crisis, he now believes a more aggressive reopening is overdue. “We’ve now learned as a society how to protect ourselves, how to protect our employees and make decisions that affect us,” Mayberry said. He said that when he goes out, he doesn’t wear a face mask. “You’re an individual and you’re responsible for your own health and your own actions. I take ‘Live Free or Die’ seriously.” Mayberry said that if elected, he will be “the 'DoorDash' of customer service.” He said he’ll have one brick and mortar office but also will furnish two small RVs with office supplies and roam the district, holding office hours in mall parking lots, at fairs and on Main Streets. “People want to be heard,” he said. He promised to be intently responsive to his fellow veterans, noting that the final push for him to get into the race was the Department of Veterans Affairs’ failure to make timely payments to providers for their treatment of sick veterans. “I’ve always wanted to help people, but that took me off the sidelines and onto the field.” Aside from constituent service, Mayberry name infrastructure as his top issue. That includes addressing not only aging roads and bridges, but also more funding for wastewater treatment, the electrical grid, energy generation and second-to-none high speed internet, he said. Since announcing his candidacy in January, Mayberry has been occasionally critical of Pappas and Mowers, but has spent most of his time laying the groundwork for a summer push for the GOP nomination and, he hopes, a general election win. He said the time will soon come when he will draw sharp distinctions with Pappas and Mowers, but for now, “I’m trying to introduce myself to the voters and I don’t need to tell anybody what I’m against. I need to tell them what I’m for. “What makes Matt Mayberry that guy that will make people say, ‘I’d feel proud to vote for him.’” “If I’m just guy beating the crap out of everyone I’m seeing in front of me, all they’re going to see is, ‘He’s the mean, angry guy.’ What does he stand for?” “They’ve got to like you before they can vote for you,” Mayberry said. “I want them to like me.” Mayberry said that while he supports Trump, he would not be a member of Congress who robotically follows the president or the leadership of the House Republican caucus. “Those people don’t vote for me,” he said. “The clear distinction in our Republican race is, I am Market Basket and Walmart, and my opponent is Whole Foods and Starbucks.” “I’m the New Hampshire candidate,” he said. “I’ve been to all 239 towns and cities. I know my way around. I know how to get things done.” He pointed to his work in securing hand sanitizer for police departments and face masks for the Hillsborough County Sheriff’s Department. “I knew who to call and get it done, myself, locally,” Mayberry said. “You’ve got to know who to call. You’ve got to understand New Hampshire. You can’t just telephone this in from Washington. “Republicans in New Hampshire are going to have a clear choice. You have the Washington insider or the local New Hampshire guy. Which way do you want to go?” Mayberry, who is openly gay, said that if he runs in a general election against Pappas, who is also openly gay, “It would be historic.” “It would be the first time in American history that both candidates for major office are gay,” Mayberry said. “And also I would be the first openly gay Republican to serve as a member of Congress. “Other members come out after they’ve been elected a few times, or they announce their retirement and two days later, announce that they’re gay.” “This would become a national race should I be the nominee.”

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Tom Cotton
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Friends —
Gen. James Mattis — a 40 year career Marine and leader of United States Marines — had this to say this week about Sen. Tom Cotton’s call for the military to police American citizens:
We must reject and hold accountable those in office who would make a mockery of our Constitution. At the same time, we must remember Lincoln’s ‘better angels,’ and listen to them, as we work to unite.”I agree with General Mattis: As a Marine veteran and former police officer, I'm insulted by Tom Cotton's facist, tone-deaf, and lawless call to mobilize the military to quash protests.
This is the opposite of leadership. Leadership doesn't come from behind a gun, it comes from setting an example — by shielding the innocent, protecting the peace, and upholding the Constitution.
Americans cannot be intimidated into accepting something that is unjust, inequitable, and plain wrong. Sen. Cotton should be ashamed of even suggesting that we try.
In the Marine Corps, we took our oath as guardians of the Constitution seriously. We fought against dictators that used unmarked police, mass surveillance, and fear to subdue their citizens.
It's not enough to disagree with Sen. Cotton, we have a duty and a responsibility to call him out for what he is — someone totally and wholly undeserving of a position of public trust or public service.
He's a political hack willing to use violent rhetoric for his own political gain. His words are antithetical to military service and disgraceful to veterans and active duty Soldiers, Sailors, Marines, and Airmen everywhere.
Yours in service,
Josh

clean_body: Friends — Gen. James Mattis — a 40 year career Marine and leader of United States Marines — had this to say this week about Sen. Tom Cotton’s call for the military to police American citizens: We must reject and hold accountable those in office who would make a mockery of our Constitution. At the same time, we must remember Lincoln’s ‘better angels,’ and listen to them, as we work to unite.”I agree with General Mattis: As a Marine veteran and former police officer, I'm insulted by Tom Cotton's facist, tone-deaf, and lawless call to mobilize the military to quash protests. This is the opposite of leadership. Leadership doesn't come from behind a gun, it comes from setting an example — by shielding the innocent, protecting the peace, and upholding the Constitution. Americans cannot be intimidated into accepting something that is unjust, inequitable, and plain wrong. Sen. Cotton should be ashamed of even suggesting that we try. In the Marine Corps, we took our oath as guardians of the Constitution seriously. We fought against dictators that used unmarked police, mass surveillance, and fear to subdue their citizens. It's not enough to disagree with Sen. Cotton, we have a duty and a responsibility to call him out for what he is — someone totally and wholly undeserving of a position of public trust or public service. He's a political hack willing to use violent rhetoric for his own political gain. His words are antithetical to military service and disgraceful to veterans and active duty Soldiers, Sailors, Marines, and Airmen everywhere. subject: Paulette - Indigenous Idaho Senate Candidate won!
body:
I couldn't be more thrilled to make this announcement with Future Generations! | | | | [ ](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=90a147b049&e=3c6155f94b)
---
| | |
## 🚨ANNOUNCEMENT🚨
Today, I have a most exciting announcement to share with you. I've been collaborating and now join leadership at Future Generations to elect bold leaders to all levels of office. Future Generations is a youth-founded, volunteer-led organization out of Seattle led by the Seventh Generation Principle of the ancient Iroquois philosophy that the decisions we make today should result in a sustainable world seven generations into the future.

My main focus will be to identify and support a diverse slate of candidates from indigenous communities and candidates who truly understand the needs of First Nations people and will lead the way as environmental champions. We will build our bench by supporting candidates seeking public office at every level: from city council to the US Senate! We will provide training, seed funding, and a nationwide network of volunteers, activists, and organizers, to give them the competitive edge needed to win. And I have more news... _**[WE'RE ALREADY WINNING!](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=1729bbb227&e=3c6155f94b)**_

[Now I need you to join us to keep the momentum up through November](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=1aad4a3866&e=3c6155f94b) — let me introduce you to our candidates!
---
| [ ](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=f3313ce1be&e=3c6155f94b)
---
### MEET PAULETTE JORDAN!
Our US Senate candidate Paulette Jordan won her Democratic Primary in a [historic landslide victory ](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=0adc280bdf&e=3c6155f94b)last week. Now that we've gone through our first milestone, we need you to ensure that Paulette, a Native American former Idaho state legislator continues making history by defeating longtime (too long) Republican Senator Jim Risch!
| [HELP PAULETTE WIN!](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=20343efe0b&e=3c6155f94b "HELP PAULETTE WIN!")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=f833be03b9&e=3c6155f94b)
---
### A longshot candidate...
Last year, our co-founder, Chiara D'Angelo, spent months traveling and working with Paulette on Lower Snake River dam breaching. In that time working with her on her ambitious and visionary proposals, she experienced Paulette's leadership firsthand in DC while fighting for our planet and all the values of Future Gen.

Working with her on this transformative campaign we can say without a doubt that having Paulette Jordan in DC, in the US Senate, would be a complete game-changer for all of our communities.
[We're investing in Paulette, because she's investing in our future!](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=b081188e1a&e=3c6155f94b)
Paulette is everything Future Generations looks for in need in a leader. She is compassionate and well spoken, but still carries a deep and ancient passion. She is a listener, bringing a unique wisdom to her work ethic.

She will lead in the spirit of her ancestors, great leaders of Idaho before her.

She perfectly embodies our philosophies, values and beliefs and will be a powerhouse champion for securing a livable future for generations to come.
|
---
| **Paulette joins two more fantastic and courageous indigenous women on our slate who will be champions for our future!**
---
| [ ](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=6fc2da0ac5&e=3c6155f94b)
---
[**Carina Miller**](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=46e3ee27b8&e=3c6155f94b), running to represent SD-30 in the Oregon State Senate WON her primary! With our network of volunteers, we can [ensure she wins in November!](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=2e3a782996&e=3c6155f94b)
[ ](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=13b968ad6e&e=3c6155f94b)
---
[**Glenda Breiler**](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=528662fbe3&e=3c6155f94b), running for Washington State House LD-22! Her Primary is coming up on August 4th, and it is crunch time! [Contribute now!](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=65fcc0bdf4&e=3c6155f94b)
|
---
| **Rounding up our current slate, are two passionate, bold progressive, and much needed candidates to flip the U.S. Senate in 2020!**
---
| [ ](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=8bd661e54b&e=3c6155f94b)
---
[**Paula Jean Swearengin**](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=a92bc9695b&e=3c6155f94b), the daughter of a coal-miner doesn't need an introduction if you watched Knock Down the House on Netflix! She is running to defeat Republican Shelley Moore Capito in November, but we must get her through the primary first which is in 3 days!

[**Donate now to help her win June 9th!**](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=5ca679fdd0&e=3c6155f94b)
[ ](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=ce8a3f7f50&e=3c6155f94b)
---
**[Dr. Al Gross](https://rozacalderon.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=48401e7aa1559c6f628bec1bd&id=2e0ec028ab&e=3c6155f94b),** is running an extremely competitive race for the Senate in Alaska. Dr. Al is a commercial fisherman, an orthopedic surgeon, and a lifelong Alaskan and has been added to the short list of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee 2020 endorsements!

Roza Calderon

clean_body: I couldn't be more thrilled to make this announcement with Future Generations! | | | | | | | 🚨ANNOUNCEMENT🚨 Today, I have a most exciting announcement to share with you. I've been collaborating and now join leadership at Future Generations to elect bold leaders to all levels of office. Future Generations is a youth-founded, volunteer-led organization out of Seattle led by the Seventh Generation Principle of the ancient Iroquois philosophy that the decisions we make today should result in a sustainable world seven generations into the future. My main focus will be to identify and support a diverse slate of candidates from indigenous communities and candidates who truly understand the needs of First Nations people and will lead the way as environmental champions. We will build our bench by supporting candidates seeking public office at every level: from city council to the US Senate! We will provide training, seed funding, and a nationwide network of volunteers, activists, and organizers, to give them the competitive edge needed to win. And I have more news... — let me introduce you to our candidates! | MEET PAULETTE JORDAN! Our US Senate candidate Paulette Jordan won her Democratic Primary in a week. Last year, our co-founder, Chiara D'Angelo, spent months traveling and working with Paulette on Lower Snake River dam breaching. In that time working with her on her ambitious and visionary proposals, she experienced Paulette's leadership firsthand in DC while fighting for our planet and all the values of Future Gen. Working with her on this transformative campaign we can say without a doubt that having Paulette Jordan in DC, in the US Senate, would be a complete game-changer for all of our communities. Paulette is everything Future Generations looks for in need in a leader. She is compassionate and well spoken, but still carries a deep and ancient passion. She is a listener, bringing a unique wisdom to her work ethic. She will lead in the spirit of her ancestors, great leaders of Idaho before her. She perfectly embodies our philosophies, values and beliefs and will be a powerhouse champion for securing a livable future for generations to come. | | Paulette joins two more fantastic and courageous indigenous women on our slate who will be champions for our future! | , running to represent SD-30 in the Oregon State Senate WON her primary! name: Minnesota House DFL
subject: In solidarity
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/uByr2s_4euIRbQUBGwdYUPVVCIvxAPQaVcIRSt0g5zw=/r6-1GqcRub7hxBY8RUdxxrUbTVLgJ2an4vgRDKAsFmE=?refcode=060720)
| | Friend, The arrival of June marks the beginning of Pride Month and the opportunity to recommit ourselves to working for justice and equality for all. Pride Month is not only a celebration of the LGBTQ+ community, but a somber reminder of the 1969 demonstrations at the Stonewall Inn that kickstarted the modern LGBTQ+ rights movement in the United States. This year is completely unprecedented and unlike Pride celebrations of recent years in more ways than one. Our minds are on the murder of George Floyd and those protesting for change and justice -- actions that began in Minnesota but have reached national and international significance. Just as the demonstrations at Stonewall began the still-ongoing revolution for LGBTQ+ rights, we hope the current protests will galvanize the much-needed movement toward true equity for black lives. The COVID-19 pandemic has also canceled many of the events that bring our community together and act as a celebration of love and progress. From legalizing marriage equality to leading the charge against conversion therapy, the House DFL will always be dedicated allies to the LBGTQ+ community. There is a long way to go -- until trans women of color stop experiencing violence at devastatingly high rates, until queer youth aren't forced to change who they are, until every single member of our community is treated equally -- but we will be with you every step of the way. Pride Month is not only a celebration of the LGBTQ+ community, but a somber reminder of the 1969 demonstrations at the Stonewall Inn that kickstarted the modern LGBTQ+ rights movement in the United States. This year is completely unprecedented and unlike Pride celebrations of recent years in more ways than one. Our minds are on the murder of George Floyd and those protesting for change and justice -- actions that began in Minnesota but have reached national and international significance. Just as the demonstrations at Stonewall began the still-ongoing revolution for LGBTQ+ rights, we hope the current protests will galvanize the much-needed movement toward true equity for black lives. The COVID-19 pandemic has also canceled many of the events that bring our community together and act as a celebration of love and progress. From legalizing marriage equality to leading the charge against conversion therapy, the House DFL will always be dedicated allies to the LBGTQ+ community. body:
| Derek-- On Friday, I filed the paperwork to officially become a candidate for the Republican nomination to represent New Hampshire’s First Congressional District. That same day, my campaign announced that we would return to in–person campaigning. My message is simple – it's time to get back to work. If it's safe enough to protest then it is safe enough to pray. If it's safe enough to riot, then it is safe enough to reopen New Hampshire. If it's safe enough to willfully disregard social distancing in order to send a message, then it's safe enough to get the men and women of New Hampshire back to work. I am not running for Congress because I am a power-hungry politician -- I am running for Congress because New Hampshire is my home, and I believe that New Hampshire deserves much better than ultra-liberal Chris Pappas. **[_I’m asking for your help. Will you join me? (secure link)_](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDM4NTcwMjc2ODMxODkyNzk0JmM9bzRiNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTYxNTQ4MzYmZD11NXkzZDNr.hd8P_opvQWy3eHZ8XpOBEZTFITRkTb3kmlkOYpKp0ZI)** I am a strong supporter of President Trump and his America First agenda. I know that President Trump can rebuild our economy, but to do so he needs allies in Congress. When I’m in office, I will go to Washington to represent New Hampshire values, not to pad my resume for a future in lobbying – and only want to be able to give back to the people of New Hampshire. Sadly, I am the only candidate who has spent more time in New Hampshire than Washington, DC over the last two years. It’s been 20 years since New Hampshire sent a military veteran to Congress. I am going to break that streak. The values that I learned in the Air Force are sorely needed in Washington: strength, honor, and commitment to community. But I can’t do this alone. If we are going to defeat the Washington insiders, I need your help today! [_Please -- will you make a contribution of any amount? Use this secure link._](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDM4NTcwMjc2ODMxODkyNzk0JmM9bzRiNyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNTYxNTQ4MzgmZD1rMGQ3eDRq.-Z4j8mhJodICeUIK79ZTeQiV_FuqxjX_6-cIkhREiqs) Thank you, and God Bless. -Matt | |

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Your next step
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
These resources are either no or low cost – so if you’re ready to take the next step in getting into a great Hoosier job | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

_**“People are our state’s most valuable resource and they are what define Indiana as a great place to live, work and grow.” -Gov. Holcomb**_

There’s no doubt: Hoosiers are facing new challenges in today’s economy due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

But thankfully, we know that Hoosiers are never down for long.

On Friday, Governor Holcomb unveiled a new plan – **[Rapid Recovery for a Better Future](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a54074503a1c4a619f584e6bd6ccd7e4&_e=H1lf6Zsg8kif2yr-QRDf_EeKCi-NsIawdkIBKXXZsGxyDILnhrp8d-LhvAuCvNPAlSFEEecJHi573mJXs5Zob247MeBjo07cV6hJYy83hqUFC_EQ5QxNzMqfBoOVuTv7LbuSlgj2O_HvPj1geuTKBGmAHE-YK5bE6TCzx2hc031zPVRbLQ8L5wPWZ67HM2arnctS8LAlJ7q9y5M9OXx-E4234ndxic7x_OgEaPQ-OojrHdi_WnEnPZynS_RMGH1OehDqm69dimDMANCAJgMz2ELO-_6pDpE8uf-XJn4Ddn16S8YOsixaQKLxJllEXneZ7zmmvOZaCTaQIRPnBTXmAslNPaQjremPqhvgMgD1bP5fw2IR__QbD1mlOtGLWT6JxOs966kgx9mINHNlaZpdVTf8IW4xEG5jC9a49rd8qa8Z5EZWWHZQlfFwsWSfjCpx)** – that’s putting its resources directly into Hoosiers – helping us all learn, connect and _**take the next step toward building the skills needed to land a good-paying, in-demand job.**_

* **Learn About Your Options:** It starts with visiting the online hub, [**YourNextStepIN.org**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a54074503a1c4a619f584e6bd6ccd7e4&_e=H1lf6Zsg8kif2yr-QRDf_GtD1dAjARZHsmu_K-8cSfNBLd0ZC0IIP_7YrmtV788c7nQV8hYaA7vE-U8g60jvt6GIj0PDm8HrSR1yxHfEAeXJKf9NCqjl3rJcvxNknKLzVl88qgAs3Eb9hcoYfTXTQOIUWLA8rrsZJ3TNQnORLsANDS4cTBs4wEgBM_ZclMTyk5bw9ffdHTUbVJuRIJOgjIfmzYxhGtMVan4eUN5PhmJEYMPzwHQOv6Z4MxtnxtjaSlnVbhn7C-pCJuBRTJWk1axkEyHP2wseYkAjAu-dRY34uFLZaw3AUvfj8Q12LxBiXUZ4rD7Xvos0jGMoOWok5zfyg7W8WCZf5mUR_Va_CPcW4eOuixmL8uMo8yXdJqGD), to learn about resources. Hoosiers will also learn from their trusted sources – like community and faith leaders.
* **Get Connected:** Talk to a real person to answer your questions and determine your best path forward.
* **Take the Next Step:** Advance your career with convenient access to accelerated programs and credentials that value prior learning and experiences, such as the Workforce Ready Grant and Ivy Tech’s Rapid Recovery program—which will provide free courses and training for 10,000 Hoosiers.

And what’s most exciting?

Thanks to the federal CARES Act, _**Indiana is investing an additional $50 million into the workforce programs Governor Holcomb has been leading since he first took office in 2017!**_

__**And it’s now expanded and accelerated.**__

This includes:
* **Expanding the Workforce Training Grant in Next Level Jobs**

This will support grants for at least an additional 10,000 Hoosiers as they gain in-demand job credentials – at no cost to the student.
* **Growing the Employer Training Grant**

This is going directly to Indiana’s employers – with a focus on women-, minority- and veteran-owned businesses, to help an additional 25,000 Hoosiers skill-up on the job.
* **Providing Career Coaching**

This is creating a single online network to direct Hoosiers to career coaching, and is working to ensure populations most impacting by COVID-19, underrepresented populations and rural communities, can have someone in their corner as they work toward a great job.

These resources are either no or low cost – so if you’re ready to take the next step in getting into a great Hoosier job, your first step is visiting **[YourNextStepIN.org](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=a54074503a1c4a619f584e6bd6ccd7e4&_e=H1lf6Zsg8kif2yr-QRDf_GtD1dAjARZHsmu_K-8cSfNBLd0ZC0IIP_7YrmtV788c7nQV8hYaA7vE-U8g60jvt6GIj0PDm8HrSR1yxHfEAeXJKf9NCqjl3rJcvxNknKLzVl88qgAs3Eb9hcoYfTXTQOIUWLA8rrsZJ3TNQnORLsCNkAFpcjMKJqA2oiqd9FlJH-qBcO0t2fzEMbFidxYpVuTI_gx5cXE99EOfgKRH390Dv4QS0qEteBgf6GnAJOoTDLHPAJGnDYbt2tGEhpgdNaeam33yc7WYLAYKl-oJroZAEMFkApX93eyjRQ0rPLC7vuXCXzzuelqyb90ON-N6DLQHJMDzWugMQj5VQ8oMQ9zshoeJWfjLwYd38I23LIjY)**.

#BackOnTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

---
Peter,

Sen. Cornyn's hypocrisy is astounding. First he was **the "top salesman" to repeal the Affordable Care Act and voted twenty times to gut its protections.** But now he's telling millions of unemployed Texans that it's "good news" they can get coverage under its protections.

**No matter what he says, actions speak louder than words,** and Senator Cornyn's actions tell us clearly: **He 's not on Texans' side when it comes to their health care.** His allies are even pushing a lawsuit to destroy the ACA and he hasn't lifted a finger to stop it!

Sen. Cornyn wants to have his cake and eat it too -- to fight **_against_** the legislation his corporate PAC donors tell him to, then turn around and tell voters that those same policies are **_good for them._** He did it with the **Affordable Care Act.** He did it with **unemployment insurance** for workers hit by COVID-19. He'll do it again. That's why we need to replace him.

**[Pitch in to help elect MJ, a candidate who believes that actions speak louder than words.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901ef/7f51f7bc/4ed29b54/4ef68ce3/2574867497/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200607.2nd__1503__&amount=10")**
\-- Team MJ

I can't tell you how touched I am by all of your birthday wishes.

**[But I'll be honest -- what I want more than anything today is your personal endorsement.](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b11b/18e32a7f/4c927dac/7b218bed/1380985597/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/endorse-ben-ray-lujan?source=20200607_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia")**

I just became your Democratic nominee for this critical Senate race.

Which means I just became one of Republicans' biggest targets -- my opponent already launched his first false attack against me!

If I don't gather the necessary support in time, Republicans will use it to prove they can take this seat from us.
**_[It would mean so much if you could sign your name, lend me your endorsement, and help me prove our OVERWHELMING support. I'm counting on 20,000 endorsers before midnight tonight. I need Democrats nationwide to have my back in this critical moment. Will you sign your name before midnight? >>](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b11b/18e32a7f/4c927dac/7b218bed/1380985597/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/endorse-ben-ray-lujan?source=20200607_em_pet_b1_lujan_ia")_**

Thank you for everything,

Ben Ray

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics.
